name: Aberrant Dragonmark
description: Increase your Constitution score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You learn a cantrip and a 1st-level spell from the sorcerer spell list, using Constitution as your spellcasting ability. You can cast the 1st-level spell once per short or long rest. When you cast it, you can expend a Hit Die to roll it: an even result grants temporary hit points equal to the roll, while an odd result deals force damage equal to the roll to a random creature within 30 feet (or you if no others are present).
